## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main` · Branch aggiornato con `main`
- [ ] Conventional Commits format · Formato Conventional Commits
- [ ] Tests added/updated · Test aggiunti/aggiornati
- [ ] Docs updated (IT + EN if user-facing) · Docs aggiornata (IT + EN se user-facing)
- [ ] Linters pass locally · Linter passano in locale
- [ ] No secrets committed · Nessun segreto committato
